criteria.message: all guidance commands declare no movement/targeting/trading/packet mutation
28 routeable override objective(s) reported with guidance-only wording
48/48 ToA mission guides source-backed, chain-checked, and exported to Lua
3/3 Odd Server route-quality baseline result(s), accepted=true
review packet contains current source hashes, required folders, and core review entry points
objective source tables and generated addon EXP table are present and schema-validated
3 open Human Review item(s) exported for Jake
Odd Server Ashita addon files hash-match source

notes: OddQ is guidance-only; this gate does not approve movement, targeting, trading, chat reading, packet mutation, or automatic arrival claims.
Odd Server is the local private server test target. Catseye production was not used for the Odd Server pilot and OddNav baseline evidence.
